page.title: Advanced Linking Devices
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Linking Devices - C1 concession, contrast, result, condition, and additive links for formal flow.
page.subtitle_text: C1 concession, contrast, result, condition, and additive links for formal flow.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"Advanced Linking Devices: compact anchors for precise logical relations in C1 writing and speech.","rules":[{"label":"Concession","text":"Use although, even though, despite, and nevertheless to contrast an expected result.","example":"Although the evidence was limited, the study was influential."},{"label":"Result","text":"Use therefore, consequently, and as a result for formal cause-result flow.","example":"The data were incomplete; consequently, the conclusion was revised."},{"label":"Condition and addition","text":"Use provided that, insofar as, furthermore, and moreover to build controlled argument structure.","example":"The plan is feasible provided that funding is secured."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the English Sentence Builder C1 advanced linking devices lesson package.
